{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/165803850?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/QiaoNPC", "id": 165803850, "login": "QiaoNPC", "node_id": "U_kgDOCeH3Sg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/QiaoNPC", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "## Summary

The `/api/create` endpoint accepted negative `expire` query values. For the memory storage backend, negative values were passed to secret creation as a negative duration and treated as no expiry, allowing callers to create secrets that persisted longer than intended.

## Impact

Unauthenticated users could bypass configured retention expectations for secrets they create by sending `POST /api/create?expire=-1`.

This does not allow reading or modifying secrets created by other users. Secrets remain one-time-read and, in the normal web flow, client-side encrypted.

## Affected versions

Versions up to and including v1.21.4 are affected.

## Patched versions

Fixed in v1.21.5.

## Workarounds

Disable expiry overrides via `disableExpiryOverride: true` until upgrading.

## Credit

Reported by Chai Cheng Xun via email.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h5fq-653g-gxrm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T17:20:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5fq-653g-gxrm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h5fq-653g-gxrm"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-05T17:20:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Luzifer/ots/security/advisories/GHSA-h5fq-653g-gxrm", "https://github.com/Luzifer/ots/commit/3511bd18a2bec75bd9c6b4d513f2a90ccf4209b7", "https://github.com/Luzifer/ots/releases/tag/v1.21.5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5fq-653g-gxrm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Luzifer/ots/security-advisories/GHSA-h5fq-653g-gxrm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Luzifer/ots", "summary": "ots has a negative expire override that can bypass its secret retention policy", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T17:20:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5fq-653g-gxrm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.21.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/Luzifer/ots"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.21.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: ots has a negative expire override that can bypass its secret retention policy
